data.title: AC Future unveiled AI Transformer Home Trailer at CES 2026, winning CES Innovation Award; their first product to market.
data.description: At the 2026 Consumer Electronics Show (CES) in Las Vegas on January 13th, AC Future, a prominent company in sustainable smart living and intelligent housing solutions, introduced its inaugural product, the AI Transformer Home Trailer (AI-THt). The AI-THt received the CES Innovation Awards® for 2026.

data.title: 2026's top side hustle: Healthy Smart Mart™ shows automated micro-retail outperforms traditional gigs, scalable for success.
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, as of January 13, 2026, a shift towards complete automation characterizes the "Side Hustle" trend for this year. Healthy Smart Mart™, a trailblazer in unattended retail, highlights the superiority of automated micro-retail over conventional franchises and gig economy positions in terms of scalability and net profit.

data.title: Atomic Invest acquires Groene Hart Financial Diensten to expand in Europe, boosting embedded investing for fintechs.
data.description: Atomic Invest has expanded its presence in Europe through the recent acquisition, which also boosts its capabilities in embedded investing for a wider range of fintechs and banking partners. This development was announced on January 13, 2026, in New York City. The company's move signifies a strategic effort to strengthen its position in the market by increasing its reach and offerings to potential clients in the region. The acquisition is expected to facilitate growth and provide more opportunities for collaboration within the industry.

data.title: North Valley Specialty Group in Sacramento modernizes wound care with mobile crew, focusing on clinical excellence. #NVSG #Sacramento
data.description: A company based in Sacramento, California, North Valley Specialty Group (NVSG), unveiled its dedication to transforming patient treatment in the region on January 13, 2026. NVSG is renowned for offering cutting-edge mobile wound care services. The company is focused on integrating innovative biological therapies into their treatment plans to enhance patient outcomes.

data.title: Online auction starting on Jan 15 to sell new & used AV gear with $20M value from Solotech's Las Vegas rental depot. 700+ lots available.
data.description: An online auction organized by Tiger Group is set to offer over 700 lots of excess equipment from Solotech's 200,000-square-foot rental depot in Las Vegas. The auction, scheduled to end in January 13, 2026, will feature a wide variety of assets from the depot, providing a significant opportunity for interested buyers to acquire quality gear.

data.title: Kiddie Academy donates $100,000 to Johns Hopkins Children's Center for child life services.
data.description: A child care provider in Baltimore, Kiddie Academy® Educational Child Care, has recently revealed their sponsorship of Johns Hopkins Children's Center. This sponsorship involves a generous donation of $100,000 towards child life services. The announcement was made on January 13th, 2026.

data.title: Videotel Digital introduces VP70 XD 4K media player for industrial use, promising unmatched reliability and stunning 4K performance.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Tempe, Arizona, Videotel Digital announced the release of the latest version of its VP70 XD 4K Industrial Looping Digital Signage Media Player. The new model improves upon the previous version known for its reliability.

data.title: University of Louisville's David Chapeau named 2025 Crunch Time Hero® by PorkRinds.com, 18,000+ fan shares drive donations for pediatric brain cancer.
data.description: An impressive number of over 18,000 fans rallied behind a Crunch Time play, transforming it into vital donations for families impacted by pediatric brain cancer through The Archer Foundation. On January 13, 2026, PorkRinds.com announced University of Louisville punter/holder David Chapeau as the 2025 Crunch Time Hero®.

the recreation index rose 1.2% in December, marking its largest one month increase since that index was created in 1993 The recreation index is a major component of the U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI), tracking price changes for goods and services like TVs, audio equipment,

data.title: Global central banks support Powell & Fed independence amid political pressure. Volatility may boost Bitcoin & gold, say crypto analysts.
data.description: Experts in the cryptocurrency industry predict that increasing political pressure on the US Federal Reserve may lead to higher volatility in the financial markets. This could potentially drive investment flows towards Bitcoin and gold as safer havens in the long term. The potential shift in focus towards these alternative assets comes as a response to uncertainties surrounding traditional currencies and monetary policies. As a result, an uptick in interest and investment in Bitcoin and gold is expected as investors seek stability and security amidst the changing economic landscape.

data.title: Kopin receives $1 million order for DarkWAVE™ Module from Theon International, a strategic partner in night-vision tech.
data.description: In Westborough, Massachusetts, Kopin Corporation revealed a significant advancement in launching its DarkWAVE™ Module by securing its first product order for the platform. Theon International, a renowned provider of night-vision and thermal imaging systems, and a key partner of Kopin, made a substantial move by placing a $1 million development order to facilitate this project. Kopin Corporation, known for its application-specific optical systems and high-performance microdisplays tailored for defense and enterprise purposes, is moving forward with this collaboration to bring the DarkWAVE™ Module to market successfully.

data.title: Retirees average $289,000 in savings but say $824,000 is needed for comfortable retirement. Many underestimate costs.
data.description: According to a recent survey, approximately 40% of retirees state that a minimum of $1 million is necessary to retire comfortably, with 92% indicating that the cost of a comfortable retirement is underestimated. As of January 13, 2026, in St. Louis, the average savings of an American retiree stands at $288,700. However, retirees feel that a significantly higher amount of $823,800 is required for a comfortable retirement.

data.title: BonBon introduces first chocolate bar, expanding viral Swedish candy movement, rooted in Scandinavian traditions.
data.description: BonBon has recently introduced its newest product, the Chocolate Wafer Bar, after years of development inspired by Scandinavian snack customs. The unveiling took place in New York on January 13, 2026. This launch comes amid an increasing popularity of Swedish candies in the U.S., with a surge in interest from consumers in Scandinavian confections. The Chocolate Wafer Bar is set to become a prominent addition to the BonBon product line as the company taps into this growing trend.
